title: Information Geometry: Fisher Metric, Natural Gradient & Exponential Families

fisher_info.note: Fisher=EML-2; log-likelihood=EML-2; Cramér-Rao=EML-2 — all information geometry = EML-2

kl_divergence.note: KL, JS, all f-divergences = EML-2 (log-based information)

fisher_metric.key_insight: ALL of information geometry = EML-2: explains why EML-2 is most populated stratum

natural_gradient.note: Natural gradient = Fisher⁻¹ · gradient: EML-2 throughout

geodesic.note: Statistical manifold geodesic: Riemannian curvature = EML-2 (log-based)

natural_gradient.key_insight: Natural gradient = EML-2 throughout; statistical manifold curvature = EML-2

eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Fisher information, KL/JS divergence, log-partition A(η), natural gradient, curvature
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Sufficient statistics T(x) (oscillatory data), likelihood function

key_theorem: The EML Information Geometry Theorem (S202): Information geometry is the EML-2 stratum of statistics: Fisher information = EML-2. KL divergence = EML-2. Log-partition function A(η) = EML-2. Natural gradient = EML-2. ALL of differential-geometric statistics is EML-2. This explains the observation from S190: EML-2 has 21+ confirmations (most of any stratum) because information geometry is ubiquitous in physics, statistics, and machine learning. The exponential family IS the EML-2 object in probability.
rabbit_hole_log: ALL information geometry = EML-2: Fisher, KL, JS, natural gradient, geodesic curvature
Log-partition function A(η) = EML-2: connects exp family to EML depth directly
EML-2 dominance explained: information geometry underlies all learning and stat mech
